title: Warped Universe
description:
Warped Universe: A Meta-driven Sci-fi Looter Shooter

You deploy onto a planet consumed by the Void. Push through the corruption with your squad, neutralize the threat, secure vital resources.

But here’s the thing - that mission didn’t just help you.

The Residuum your squad obtained just powered a facility on that planet. That facility when completed just gave a permanent buff to every player in the game. Simultaneously, another player exploring a sector discovered a new planet for even more global buffs. And there's hundreds of these objectives to be completed each season.

That’s Warped Universe. A co-op PvE looter shooter where the community drives the entire universe forward togethe

Explore. Defend. Upgrade. Empower.

Explore: Discover uncharted sectors and hidden planets.

Defend: Protect hundreds of seasonal objectives from the Void.

Upgrade: Collect Cores and Sparks to evolve your custom Echo Suit.

Empower: Secure facilities to unlock permanent global buffs for everyone.

IF YOU LIKE THESE GAMES, YOU’LL FEEL AT HOME IN OUR UNIVERSE

The co-op PvE loop will feel familiar if you play Helldivers 2, Deep Rock Galactic, Warframe, or Destiny 2. Space flight will feel familiar to those who play Everspace 2 and Star Wars Battlefront. For the fans of tactical games like XCOM 2, Fallout Tactics, and Gears Tactics, we offer the ability to play all missions as turn-based as well as real-time. We took what we love about those games and built something new where everyone matters, and every mission counts towards the seasonal system objectives.

EARLY ACCESS - WHAT’S HERE NOW

Co-op ground combat and space exploration for 1–4 players. Social hub. Planetary facility progression. Seasonal solar system where the community unlocks new planets together. Multiple ways to approach every mission.

WHAT MAKES IT DIFFERENT

A Shared Destiny

Every mission feeds the bigger picture. Complete objectives, extract Residuum, activate planetary facilities. The buffs don’t just go to your squad. They go to everyone. The more the community plays, the more the solar system opens up. Every facility you finish unlocks a permanent power-up for the entire community.

Play Your Way

Bring your shooter friend. Bring your tactics friend. Bring the friend who just wants to fly through space. Everyone plays the way they want, and it all counts. The solar system expands based on what the community accomplishes together.

Independently Developed

Built by a team of 12 with credits on Jumpgate, Auto Assault, LEGO Universe, and Dragons & Titans. No publisher.

Key Features

A Shared Sci-fi Universe : Every player contributes to the season-wide meta-goal of building and defending the cosmos.

Personal and Communal Progression: Power up your gear while advancing through planetary facilities that buff the entire community.

Ground Combat: Engage in missions across diverse locations, including asteroids and evolving planets.

Space Exploration: Navigate asteroid fields, debris, and mysterious giant warped organic matter.

Persistent Hub: Nexus Station as your central operations hub.

Community-Driven: Seasonal solar system structure where new planets unlock as the community advances.

Choose Your Playstyle: Seamlessly switch between real-time action and turn-based tactics in both ground and space combat.

Co-op PvE Missions: Form teams of up to four players to battle the Void across ever-changing solar systems, or go it alone and still impact all with your actions.

Seasonal Content: Expanding solar systems, evolving gameplay, and new challenges every season.

Nexus Station

The Nexus Station is the central hub for players in Warped Universe, functioning as a vibrant social, strategic, and operational base. Within the station, players will find a variety of features that enhance both gameplay and interaction. The real-time 3D solar system map allows players to track planetary progress, monitor operational facilities, and scout for regions of space to expand the Oracle’s reach.

Workstations throughout the station allow players to acquire new equipment, apply cosmetics, and add upgrades to enhance their arsenal in preparation for what lurks beyond.

WHAT’S COMING

Season Zero is just the beginning. We have major gameplay expansions planned that will fundamentally change how you approach every mission. Follow us for reveals.
Workstations throughout the station allow players to acquire new equipment, apply cosmetics, and add upgrades to enhance their arsenal in preparation for what lurks beyond.

SEASONAL SOLAR SYSTEMS

In Warped Universe, seasonal gameplay will keep the experience fresh and ever-changing. As players complete missions and collect Residuum, they’ll construct new planets and establish various facilities to unlock technologies, all while defending their creations from the Void’s relentless threat.

Each season introduces new solar systems, missions, and technology to explore with lore updates that bring new environments, combatants, and cosmetics.

SEASON ZERO

This is the beginning. New planets, new enemies, new facilities. Your progress matters. What the community builds in Season Zero shapes everything that comes next.
